title: tragacantha denudata
intro: Tragacantha denudata, also known as the hairless milk thistle or bare- flowered milk thistle, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha denudata include its ability to protect the liver, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. Tragacantha denudata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs for its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
